articles.title: 'Significant damage': How Brexit is still draining the UK economy 10 years later
articles.summary: Ten years after Brexit, data shows that the decision to leave the European Union has made people in Britain up to 8 percent poorer. Experts predict the economic damage is set to continue, and YouGov polling now finds nearly 60 percent of Britons say it was wrong to leave the EU.
